topic: Automation & self-management reality map: skill advisor + code graph + system-spec-kit + memory/database + hook system across 5 CLI runtimes
researchQuestions: RQ1: Skill advisor automation - hook fires vs CLI invocation vs MCP tool vs scoring tuner; per-runtime entry-point chain
RQ2: Code graph automation - scan/verify/status/ensureReady/watcher; auto-fires vs operator-triggered
RQ3: system-spec-kit automation - validator, generate-context, is_phase_parent detection, continuity refresh, auto-indexing
RQ4: Database/memory automation - memory_save, index_scan, match_triggers, session_bootstrap, checkpoints, retention, causal-graph
RQ5: Hook system reality per runtime - Claude / Copilot / Codex / Gemini / OpenCode-plugin-bridge / native; wired vs unwired with config-file:line evidence
RQ6: Cross-cutting auto-wiring gaps - claims-without-runtime-path; runtime-paths-without-docs
RQ7: Synthesis 4-column reality map - claim / actual behavior / gap-class / recommended-action; at least 8 rows per subsystem
